data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #57
data.summary: [2/24 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[2/24 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total/Grand Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 23
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3386413

#BlueArchive
